reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineers the live Shopify site (www.homeu.ph) with Playwright + Ollama vision + Central Brain

central-brain.description: Migration Central Brain — PostgreSQL memory + Hermes3 reasoning for the Shopify → Payload CMS migration

shopify-reverse-engineer.description: Full migration pipeline: Playwright scan, Ollama vision (llava:7b), Central Brain (PostgreSQL + Hermes3), Shopify export parser

migration-central-brain.description: PostgreSQL-backed migration memory with Hermes3 reasoning for intelligent migration decisions

reverse-engineer.description: Run full Shopify reverse engineering pipeline with Central Brain
reverse-engineer.prompt: Load the shopify-reverse-engineer skill. Initialize the Central Brain database, run Playwright scanner, analyze with Hermes3, parse Shopify exports, and generate Payload CMS import data.

playwright-scan.description: Scan www.homeu.ph with Playwright + store results in Central Brain
playwright-scan.prompt: Run Playwright scanner with --brain flag to automatically store all discovered pages, products, collections, and SEO data into the Central Brain PostgreSQL database.

brain-status.description: Show Central Brain migration status and Hermes3-recommended next steps
brain-status.prompt: Run tools/migration-brain/brain.mjs to check migration status, then ask hermes3 for next steps.

parse-shopify-export.description: Parse Shopify exports and cross-reference with Central Brain via Hermes3
parse-shopify-export.prompt: Run tools/shopify-import/parser.mjs to parse exports, then use hermes-agent.mjs to cross-reference with scanner data stored in Central Brain.
